title: The Ungrateful Wolf
content:
To the Wolf, from whose throat Dr Crane
    Drew the bone, his long bill made it plain
    He expected his fee:
    Snarled Wolf--"Fiddle de dee,
    Be thankful your head's out again."

    Some Characters Have No Sense Of Obligation
meaning:
"The Ungrateful Wolf" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
